name: infamous-freight
description: Infamous Freight — The freight dispatch platform built by truckers, for truckers

scripts.dev:api: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run start:dev
scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web
scripts.build:api: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run build
scripts.start: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run start:prod
scripts.lint: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run lint && pnpm -C apps/web run lint
scripts.test: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run test --
scripts.test:coverage: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run test:coverage
scripts.prisma:generate: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:seed: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && pnpm -C apps/api exec prisma db seed --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:setup: pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run prisma:migrate && pnpm run prisma:seed
scripts.deploy:install-clis: sh -c 'if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then bash scripts/install-dev-clis.sh; elif command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo bash scripts/install-dev-clis.sh; else echo "Error: scripts/install-dev-clis.sh requires root. Re-run with sudo: sudo pnpm run deploy:install-clis" >&2; exit 1; fi'
scripts.setup: pnpm run env:setup && pnpm run db:setup
